mapper.insert: insert into ServiceArea (SAName, SADirection, WayNum, CompactParking, LargeParking, DisabledParking, Address, Tel, ShopCode) values (#{SAName}, #{SADirection}, #{WayNum}, #{CompactParking}, #{LargeParking}, #{DisabledParking}, #{Address}, #{Tel}, #{ShopCode}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE SAName = values(SAName), SADirection = values(SADirection), WayNum = values(WayNum), CompactParking = values(CompactParking), LargeParking = values(LargeParking), DisabledParking = values(DisabledParking), Address = values(Address), Tel = values(Tel), ShopCode = values(ShopCode)

insert into ServiceArea (SAName, SADirection, WayNum, CompactParking, LargeParking, DisabledParking, Address, Tel, ShopCode) values (#{SAName}, #{SADirection}, #{WayNum}, #{CompactParking}, #{LargeParking}, #{DisabledParking}, #{Address}, #{Tel}, #{ShopCode})
mapper.update: update ServiceArea set WayNum = #{WayNum}, CompactParking = #{CompactParking}, LargeParking = #{LargeParking}, DisabledParking = #{DisabledParking}, Address = #{Address}, Tel = #{Tel}, ShopCode = #{ShopCode} where SAName = #{SAName} and SADirection = #{SADirection}
mapper.select: select * from ServiceArea where SAName = #{SAName} and SADirection = #{SADirection}
